name: studiomeyer-academy-hooks
description: Auto-load XP + rank + next lesson on session start. Optional cascade: auto-fetch quiz after lesson complete. Two mcp_tool hooks for the StudioMeyer Academy MCP. Requires Claude Code v2.1.118 or later.

compliance.gdpr: Academy data flows from your Claude Code session to your own Academy tenant on studiomeyer.academy. No third-party sharing. Your XP and progress are not exposed in any leaderboard unless you opt-in.
compliance.notes: All three tools (academy_stats, academy_next_lesson, academy_quiz) are read-only. The cascade pattern (lesson-complete → quiz-fetch) is opt-in — remove the PostToolUse entry if you don't want it.
